abstract: A system for optimizing a manufacturing schedule using a trained neural network.
claims: 1. A method comprising receiving production data and generating a schedule with a trained neural network.\n\n2. The method of claim 1, wherein the network is updated using observed delays.

abstract: A fastener assembly for joining two structural panels.
claims: 1. A fastener assembly comprising a threaded bolt and a locking nut.\n\n2. The assembly of claim 1, wherein the locking nut comprises a steel insert.
